description: DataRef.embedded.content_hash is present but does not match the SHA-256 of the decoded bytes for the declared encoding. Registry MUST reject with data_ref_hash_mismatch (NOT hash_mismatch, which is the body-level ProducerContent code; NOT invalid_signature). This is a DataRef-level integrity failure — the body's own content_hash and signature remain valid. See RFC-ACDP-0007 §5 'Distinguishing hash failures'. Decoding rules per RFC-ACDP-0002 §6.3: base64 → decoded bytes; utf8 → UTF-8 bytes; json → JCS canonical bytes.
